narrative:
Sugar Creek Twp (precinct in Putnam County) has 783 registered voters, with 42.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 51.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 44.7 percentage points.
